CVE-2025-65203.title: KeePassXC-Browser thru 1.9.9.2 autofills or prompts to fill store ...
CVE-2025-65203.description: KeePassXC-Browser thru 1.9.9.2 autofills or prompts to fill stored credentials into documents rendered under a browser-enforced CSP directive and iframe attribute sandbox, allowing attacker-controlled script in the sandboxed document to access populated form fields and exfiltrate credentials.
